title: Team Offsite Meal Orchestration
summary: Coordinates a large team meal by combining dietary segmentation, budget control, timing constraints, restaurant reliability checks, batching, and fallback planning.

inputs.name: teamName
inputs.description: Name of the team or event receiving the order.

inputs.name: headcount
inputs.description: Total number of people included in the orchestration.

inputs.name: officeLocation
inputs.description: Drop location or office cluster used for restaurant selection.

inputs.name: dietaryMatrix
inputs.description: Counts or segments for vegetarian, vegan, Jain, high-protein, and allergy-sensitive diners.

inputs.name: budgetCap
inputs.description: Maximum spend across food, packaging, and delivery.

inputs.name: cuisineAvoidance
inputs.description: Cuisine types to avoid because of repetition or team fatigue.

steps.title: Collect operating constraints
steps.description: Normalize headcount, dietary segments, budget cap, time window, and location into one request object.

steps.title: Search primary restaurant candidates
steps.description: Discover restaurants that can plausibly support the order size, timing window, and cuisine mix.

steps.title: Inspect menus and fulfillment capacity
steps.description: Review menus across multiple restaurants to map dietary coverage, pricing, and potential batching strategy.

steps.title: Build primary and fallback baskets
steps.description: Create the best ordering plan plus backup carts in case a restaurant goes offline or key items become unavailable.

steps.title: Stage the chosen cart
steps.description: Write the selected basket into the cart in a reviewable state.

steps.title: Request organizer approval
steps.description: Require a final review of budget, segmentation coverage, and fallback readiness before any mutation-heavy action.

steps.title: Place the approved order
steps.description: Submit the final order only after approval and cart review.

steps.title: Track fulfillment
steps.description: Track live delivery state and communicate updates back to the organizer.

guarantees: Forces planning and approval before irreversible ordering steps.
Treats fallback handling as part of the workflow instead of an afterthought.
limitations: Still depends on app-side metadata for reliability and preparation-time confidence.
The current CLI can plan this workflow but does not yet execute the full orchestration automatically.
